title: Scale Neuronpedia Attribution Graph Corpus to 250+ with Balanced Domains, Correctness Annotations, and Difficulty Stratification
summary: Demo notebook for the Neuronpedia Attribution Graph Dataset (gemma-2-2b). Loads 8 mini attribution graphs (1 per domain: antonym, arithmetic, code_completion, country_capital, multi_hop_reasoning, rhyme, sentiment, translation) from GitHub URL with local fallback. Parses JSON-encoded DAGs into NetworkX DiGraphs, extracts structural metadata (node/edge counts, density, correctness, difficulty), validates DAG properties, and visualizes per-domain statistics with matplotlib bar charts plus an example graph layout colored by feature type.
